ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent experiment type */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the experiment type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lenses" (
  "lens_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lens */,
  "lens_name" TEXT /* Name of the lens */,
  "lens_type" TEXT /* Type of the lens (e.g., Powell lens) */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the lens in millimeters */,
  "focal_length" REAL /* Focal length of the lens in centimeters */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the lens */,
  "coating" TEXT /* Coating on the lens */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the lens */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the lens */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lens_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the measurement belongs to */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the laser in nanometers */,
  "lens_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lens used in the experiment */,
  "lens_distance" REAL /* Distance between the lens and the laser source in centimeters */,
  "od" INTEGER /* Optical density */,
  "focal_length" REAL /* Focal length of the lens in centimeters */,
  "camera_position" REAL /* Position of the camera in centimeters */,
  "nappe_width" REAL /* Width of the nappe in millimeters */,
  "nappe_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the nappe in millimeters */,
  "beam_power" REAL /* Power of the laser beam in milliwatts */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was taken */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who took the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations related to the measurement */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the measurement data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_measurements_lens_id FOREIGN KEY ("lens_id") REFERENCES lenses ("lens_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., Laser, Camera) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was purchased */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_equipment" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment mapping */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "setup_description" TEXT /* Description of the setup */,
  "setup_date" TEXT /* Date when the setup was performed */,
  "setup_by" TEXT /* User who performed the setup */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the equipment during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_equipment_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_users" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user mapping */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., lead researcher, assistant) */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned to the experiment */,
  "unassigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was unassigned from the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the user's involvement in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_users_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the file */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "environment_description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental conditions */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions during the experiment */,
  "vibration_level" TEXT /* Vibration level during the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations about the conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., beam width, power output) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "result_time" TEXT /* Time when the result was recorded */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who recorded the result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was made */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who made the note */,
  "notes_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., observation, issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the publication */,
  "funding_acknowledgment" TEXT /* Acknowledgment of funding sources in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
